metaTitle: The Boeing Atmosphere Global Documentation Hub - Atmosphere Strategy

header.title: Strategy
header.description: The Atmosphere strategy of today, driving purposeful success in the future

sections.text:
Atmosphere strategy

The success of Atmosphere lies in creating a flexible, adaptable system with strong governance and documentation that enables teams to build quickly and efficiently. Atmosphere is managed as a product and is constantly refined based on user data and feedback, making sure that it serves the current needs of DAS and remains future-proof. With a strong focus on modularity, (AI) automation, collaboration, and continuous improvements, Atmosphere will drive both the growth and quality of our digital products while keeping teams aligned and productive.

Mission Statement

Our mission is to empower DAS teams to create cohesive, intuitive, and high-quality user experiences by providing a flexible, scalable, and accessible foundational design system.

We aim to simplify the design and development process, foster collaboration, and ensure consistency across all digital products, without creating dependencies or relying on the need for extensive processes.

Through a robust, well-documented system of reusable generic components, patterns, and best practices, we empower DAS teams to quickly and efficiently build impactful digital solutions that delight Boeing users and drive business success.

Vision Statement

Our vision is to revolutionize the way we build digital products by creating a unified, dynamic design system that adapts to the needs of DAS teams and evolves with the use of artificial intelligence and other future technologies.

We aspire to be the foundation of every DAS product by delivering components and aviation patterns that enable DAS teams to deliver seamless and integrated user-centered products across multiple platforms.

By fostering a culture of design excellence and collaboration, we envision future Boeing products to have beautiful, consistent, and accessible designs that are effortlessly integrated into every digital touchpoint, empowering teams to bring their ideas to life faster and with greater impact.

Scope of Atmosphere

Atmosphere focuses on foundational components and assets for DAS applications. Before adding new features or components to the design system, we make sure that they can be applied across multiple applications and are useful to multiple teams. For more information about contributing or requesting components, read Contribute to Atmosphere.
